mapper.select:
SELECT post.id, post.title, post.digest, post.create_by, post.create_time, IFNULL(cu.username, '未知') as createUsername, IFNULL(cu.nickname, '未知') as createByName, post.view_count FROM cat_gan_da_shi_post post LEFT JOIN cat_user cu on post.create_by = cu.id and cu.deleted = '0'
and post.deleted = '0' and ( post.title like concat('%',#{param.search},'%') or post.text like concat('%',#{param.search},'%') )
and cu.id = #{param.userId}
ORDER BY post.create_time DESC

SELECT post.id, post.title, post.content, post.digest, post.create_by, post.create_time, IFNULL(cu.username, 'anonymous') as createUsername, IFNULL(cu.nickname, '未知') as createByName, post.view_count FROM cat_gan_da_shi_post post LEFT JOIN cat_user cu on post.create_by = cu.id and cu.deleted = '0'
and post.deleted = '0' and post.id = #{id}
